data.title: Vemanti Group Issues Statement Regarding ONUS Platform Status
data.description: In Irvine, CA, on March 21, 2026, Vemanti Group, Inc. disclosed a notable service disruption on the ONUS Pro platform. Users are facing difficulties in accessing their accounts and funds. The Company, known as Vemanti and trading as OTC: VMNT, acknowledged this issue.

data.title: Kraft Hockeyville Reveals Taber, AB and Tumbler Ridge, BC as Top Two Finalists in 20th Anniversary Year
data.description: In Toronto, Kraft Heinz, along with the NHL® and NHLPA, revealed the finalists for Kraft Hockeyville 2026: Taber Community Centre in Taber, Alberta, and Tumbler Ridge Community Centre Arena in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia. Canadians can vote for the winner at krafthockeyville.ca between April 3, 2026.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Hadrian/
data.description: A new advanced manufacturing facility has been opened by Hadrian in Alabama to aid in the production of submarines for the Columbia and Virginia classes. The news was announced on 20-Mar-2026 by Hadrian via PR Newswire. The facility’s opening signals a significant investment in the region's manufacturing sector, with a focus on supporting the production of submarines. The Secretary of the Navy, John C. Phelan, also provided a quote emphasizing the importance of this new facility in enhancing the naval capabilities of the country. This development underscores the commitment to bolstering the defense industry and creating job opportunities in Alabama.

data.title: Brazil's finance minister delays crypto tax plans amid election campaign. Election set for Oct 2026; incumbent Lula da Silva seeks re-election.
data.description: In October 2026, the upcoming presidential election in a South American nation will see incumbent candidate Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva seeking re-election.

data.title: Frost School of Music Dean Shelly Berg Closes His Nearly Two Decade-Long Tenure by Securing More than $175 Million in Donations
data.description: The impressive fundraising total reflects the lasting impact Berg had as the leader of a leading music school globally. The Frost School of Music at the University of Miami in Coral Gables, Fla., saw leaders, faculty, and alumni unite on March 21, 2026. The total donation marked a significant milestone in acknowledging Berg's transformational legacy in heading one of the top music schools.

data.title: Medicus IT Appoints Shelby Kobes as Senior Director of Nonprofit & Community Health
data.description: Today, a top healthcare security and GRC leader has been selected to spearhead the expansion of Medicus IT into the nonprofit and community health center sector. This development was revealed in New York on March 21, 2026, through a press release. Medicus IT is well-known for delivering IT Managed Services and Cybersecurity solutions to healthcare companies. The leader's appointment is part of the company's strategy to tap into new markets and increase its presence in the industry.

data.title: Major Shareholder Announcement
data.description: Bang & Olufsen A/S has been notified by UBS Group AG, according to the Danish Capital Markets Act, of a significant shareholder holding in the company.

data.title: George Haseotes, 94, who Helped Lead Family's Cumberland Farms Convenience Store and Gas Station Empire, has Died
data.description: On March 21, 2026 in Boston, George Haseotes from Massachusetts and Florida, part of the family behind Cumberland Farms, has played a pivotal role in transforming the chain of convenience stores and gas stations into a major company on the East Coast. Cumberland Farms, starting from a local entity, has expanded its reach significantly under George Haseotes' guidance, becoming a prominent player in the New England area.

data.title: CALLING ALL BUILDERS, DREAMERS, AND REALITY-EXPANDERS
data.description: Unlikely Collaborators has announced the theme for their Year 2 Game Jam in Los Angeles on March 21, 2026. This event is not your typical Game Jam as participants have the opportunity to challenge reality. Unlikely Collaborators is hosting its second annual Game Jam with the theme of Perception Box for this year's event, promising an immersive and thought-provoking experience.

data.title: HII Celebrates 2025 Graduates of The Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School
data.description: Today in Newport News, Virginia, HII (NYSE: HII) organized a graduation ceremony at Liberty Live Church in Hampton. The event celebrated the success of 128 graduates from the Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School.

data.title: Iceland Seafood International hf: Information related to Annual General Meeting
data.description: The upcoming Annual General Meeting of Iceland Seafood International hf is scheduled for Thursday, March 24th at 4:00 pm. The venue for the meeting is set to be the Hilton Reykjavík Nordica located at Suðurlandsbraut 2, 108 Reykjavík.

data.title: 7 top public companies amassing Ethereum, acquiring billions in ETH and becoming major holders.
data.description: Several publicly traded companies have been accumulating significant amounts of Ethereum, amassing billions of dollars worth of ETH. These companies now stand as the largest holders of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: A major radio network, known for launching journalists like Edward R. Murrow, will end its final broadcast in May.
data.description: A prominent media network that has been a key player in the industry for many years, and helped kickstart the careers of renowned journalists such as Edward R. Murrow, is set to air its last broadcast in May.

data.title: Bitcoin options indicate fear despite low BTC ETF outflows; US macro conditions and high oil prices leave traders wary.
data.description: Although Bitcoin ETF outflows remain minimal and do not indicate a shift towards bearish sentiment among traders, the escalating US macroeconomic challenges and surging oil prices are causing uncertainty among BTC traders. These factors are contributing to a cautious approach in the market despite the limited outflows.

data.title: TTW Reveals Top 50 Safest Travel Destinations Around the World for 2026
data.description: In a recent report released on March 21, 2026, travel organization TTW has unveiled the Top 50 most secure travel spots globally for the year 2026. This announcement comes amidst ongoing global uncertainties that are significantly influencing travel behaviors. The emphasis on safety has now shifted from being a preference to a necessity for travelers. The report highlights escalating geopolitical tensions in regions such as Latin America and West Asia, which have further amplified the importance of choosing secure destinations.

data.title: Amazon gains success with 'Project Hail Mary' from MGM, providing the much-needed push.
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a record high of over 200,000 in a single day. This surge in cases has resulted in a total of more than 10 million confirmed cases globally. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 500,000, with experts warning that the situation is likely to worsen in the coming weeks. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 2.5 million cases and counting. Amid these alarming numbers, authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Ethereum set for 25% rally as top ETH whales resurface in profit. Price may hit $2,750 in June and $3,200 by September.
data.description: The price of Ethereum (ETH) is forecasted to potentially increase to around $2,750 by June and surpass $3,200 by September if historical patterns related to whale-profit signals are realized once more.

data.title: Pentagon Taps Palantir Maven Battlefield System For Wider Military Use
data.description: The Pentagon has announced its intention to expand the utilization of Palantir's Maven military system. Reports show that the technical ratings for Palantir stock have seen an upturn following the escalation of tensions in the U.S.-Iran conflict. This decision marks a significant move towards integrating Palantir's technology across various military operations.

data.title: Kaldalón hf.: Final Agenda, Proposals and Candidacies for the AGM to be held on 26 March 2026
data.description: Kaldalón hf. will conduct its Annual General Meeting on Thursday, March 26, 2026, commencing at 16:00. The meeting will take place at Reykjavík Natura, located at Nauthólsvegur 52, 101 Reykjavík.

data.title: Circulation Supplements by PureHealth Research Utilize Omega Fatty Acids and Cardiovascular Botanicals to Support Heart Health
data.description: On March 21, 2026, in MANASSAS, Va., a recent study finds that effective circulation supplements influence multiple pathways crucial for systemic blood flow. Factors such as cardiac output, arterial wall integrity, and metabolic function must work in harmony for optimal circulation. The study highlights the importance of balancing these systems to ensure robust blood flow.
